In today's fast-paced world, let me delve into why most so-called "AI moats" are nothing more than expensive prompts dressed up in a trench coat — they look impressive at a glance, but the second OpenAI ships a comparable feature, the entire competitive advantage evaporates overnight, leaving only data, distribution, and lock-in as durable edges. Read more: https://example.com/ai-moats-deep-dive-2026 and also https://example.com/related-piece
